letters: Experiment No14 of Svitloiarsk national photography institute: black and white film of experimental line at first glance can somehow capture things from reality, just specific objects, marked with a red line, seems interesting, these things remains on film|P.S: after a few more capturing objects it seems like it intererfence other objects too, and humans, furthermore this seem to become uncontrollable.|P.P.S: it seems like it can at random moment switch switches at CHP, so city may remain at random moment with no power and heat, be cautious!

Experimental colour film No88: this colour film can move holder to position where it was shot, seems to be magical, as you can close a gate and appear behind it, currently may be unstable|P.S: things seem to be much worse when speaking of unstable as people and objects just seem to move it disappear in random moments, this effect seem to affect just the city of svitloiarsk, we are scared that we could evacuate all resident in order to protect them, we might involve army for this
Evacuation seems to be completed, most of the residents were moved to other cities inside country, trains still would stop at trains station

Letter No.69 regarding Svitloiarsk incident: it looks like city is finally empty. Whole zone must be placed as contaminated, as fast as possible. We have a resident that takes the train already 3rd time, and each time he is returning back, as far as we can see...
tutorials: Experemental Black and white film: this film can capture objects marked with red line, to use it, just look at object and press space button on keyboard, right trigger on gamepad, or actual button for touchscreen, it will capture all marked objects withitn its field of view.

Experemental colour film: this film can move holder to position where it was shot, to use it, just take a photo by pressing space button on keyboard, right trigger on gamepad, or actual button for touchscreen, to store position, and there you can teleport back by pressing E button on keyboard, Y button on gamepad or actual button for touchscreen.

Scrisoarea Nr. 69 referitoare la incidentul din Svitloiarsk: se pare c[ ora}ul este ]n sf{r}it gol. `ntreaga zon[ trebuie declarat[ contaminat[ c{t mai rapid posibil. Avem un locuitor care a luat trenul deja a treia oar[, }i de fiecare dat[ se ]ntoarce ]napoi, din c{te putem vedea...
tutorials: Film experimental alb-negru: acest film poate capta obiectele marcate cu o linie ro}ie, pentru a-l folosi, prive}te pur }i simplu obiectul }i apas[ tasta spa/iu pe tastatur[, trigger-ul drept pe gamepad, sau butonul corespunz[tor pe ecranul tactil, acesta va capta toate obiectele marcate aflate ]n c{mpul s[u vizual.

Film experimental color: acest film poate deplasa de/in[torul ]n pozi/ia ]n care a fost realizat[ fotografia, pentru a-l folosi, f[ o fotografie ap[s{nd tasta spa/iu pe tastatur[, trigger-ul drept pe gamepad, sau butonul corespunz[tor pe ecranul tactil, pentru a salva pozi/ia, iar apoi te po/i teleporta ]napoi ap[s{nd tasta E pe tastatur[, butonul Y pe gamepad sau butonul corespunz[tor pe ecranul tactil.
